# Architecture

This is a navigation alias for an existing project adopted into Product Factory OS. Do not duplicate architecture here.

## Canonical Sources

- Project-local architecture and production facts: `AGENTS.md`
- Agent-facing runtime rules: `CODEX.md`
- Reloadable architecture state: `.codex-memory/STATE.json`
- Product and regression contracts: `.pfo/PROJECT_CONTRACT.md`
- Scope and forbidden changes: `.pfo/SCOPE_LOCK.md`, `.pfo/FORBIDDEN_CHANGES.md`
- Data and fallback rules: `.pfo/DATA_POLICY.md`, `.pfo/FALLBACK_POLICY.md`

## Rule

Update the canonical sources first. Keep this file as a short index only.
